messages.subject: Re: Following up on our discussion
messages.snippet: Hi Andriy, just wanted to circle back on what we discussed last Thursday. I've reviewed the proposal internally and have a few points I'd like to go over. Could we find 30 minutes next week?

messages.subject: Meeting request — Thursday 2pm
messages.snippet: Hey Andriy, are you available Thursday at 2pm CET for a quick sync on the integration timeline? I'd like to align on the Q3 deliverables before the steering committee next Monday.

messages.subject: Partnership opportunity — data mesh tooling
messages.snippet: Hi Andriy, I came across your talk on data contracts at the Berlin meetup last month. We're building a data mesh platform and I think there could be interesting synergies. Would you be open to a 20-minute call?

messages.subject: Sprint review notes — data pipeline team
messages.snippet: Hi Andriy, attaching the sprint review notes from today's session. Key highlights: the ingestion pipeline migration is 80% complete, we identified a blocker on the schema registry integration. No action needed from you — just keeping you in the loop.

messages.subject: [data-contracts-toolkit] Issue #247: Schema validation fails on nested arrays
messages.snippet: New issue opened by @user-xyz: When validating a schema with nested arrays, the validator throws an unexpected error...

messages.subject: Your AWS invoice for April 2026
messages.snippet: Your AWS invoice for the billing period April 1-15, 2026 is now available. Total: €342.17.

messages.subject: Re: Contract renewal timeline
messages.snippet: Andriy, quick heads up — the legal team needs the signed addendum by end of month. Marc mentioned you two are still discussing the technical scope. Let me know if I can help unblock.

messages.subject: Data Engineering Weekly #287 — dbt 2.0 deep dive
messages.snippet: This week: dbt 2.0 launches with native Python models, Snowflake acquires data observability startup, and why data contracts are becoming the new API specs...

messages.subject: Reminder: Team standup — tomorrow 9:30 AM
messages.snippet: Reminder: Team standup is scheduled for tomorrow, Friday April 18, at 9:30 AM CET.

messages.subject: Quick question on data quality metrics
messages.snippet: Hi Andriy, we're setting up our data quality dashboard and I wanted to ask — which metrics do you recommend tracking for contract compliance? We're using Great Expectations but open to alternatives.

messages.subject: Your order has been shipped
messages.snippet: Good news! Your order #ZL-9283747 has been shipped and is on its way. Expected delivery: April 19-20.

messages.subject: FYI: New data governance policy draft
messages.snippet: Hi all, sharing the draft data governance policy for review. Comments welcome by end of next week. This covers data classification, retention, and access control standards.

messages.subject: You have 5 new connection requests
messages.snippet: Sarah Chen, Marc Lefèvre, and 3 others want to connect with you.

messages.subject: [RESOLVED] Pipeline delay — customer_events ingestion
messages.snippet: The customer_events ingestion pipeline delay has been resolved. Root cause: upstream API rate limiting. SLA impact: 47 minutes. No data loss.

messages.subject: Re: Technical scope for Phase 2
messages.snippet: Andriy, I've attached the updated requirements for Phase 2. The main change is the addition of real-time streaming, which Pierre flagged as a priority for the renewal. Let me know your thoughts.
